headings.usage: Use for all main section titles, car names, and large impact numbers.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, specifications, trust badges, and small text.

grids.inventory: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#E25822] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#C94B1B] transition-transform duration-200 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A192F] border border-slate-200 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors duration-200
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#E25822] text-[#E25822] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#FFF3ED] transition-colors duration-200

cards.car_card: bg-white rounded-[16px] overflow-hidden border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 group flex flex-col h-full

badges.verified: bg-[#ECFDF5] text-[#10B981] px-3 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5
badges.deal: bg-[#FFF3ED] text-[#E25822] px-3 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5

motion.reveal: framer-motion initial={ opacity: 0, y: 20 } animate={ opacity: 1, y: 0 } transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}

images.description: Dark luxury car parked on scenic mountain overlook - use as main hero background with gradient overlay
White modern sedan on white background - perfect for inventory card
White SUV parked - use for SUV category or featured inventory
Grey Porsche Cayenne - premium vehicle for featured section
Happy couple/man leaning on car - use for trust or why buy from us section

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Orange accent (#E25822) against white is good, but white text on #E25822 must be bold for readability.
accessibility.aria: Add aria-labels to all icon buttons and image alt tags.

instructions_to_main_agent: Transform the Carloop site to 'TruVant' branding (use provided text, adopt the new style).
Do NOT alter any backend/API logic. Only edit React/Tailwind frontend code (.js/.jsx files).
Mobile-First: Implement a sticky bottom bar on mobile with 'Call', 'WhatsApp', and 'Filter' actions (glassmorphism style).
Card UI: Car cards MUST display Key Details (Year, KMs, Fuel, Transmission) cleanly, with tags like 'Featured' or 'Best Deal' overlapping the image top-left.
Hover states: Car card images should slightly scale up on hover (e.g. group-hover:scale-105) without breaking border radius (overflow-hidden). The card itself should lift and cast a larger shadow.
Trust Badges: Must be highly visible, use Lucide icons with the Emerald Green success color to communicate security.
Typography: Import Outfit and DM Sans from Google Fonts in index.css or index.html and apply to Tailwind config.
Layouts: Do not center all text. Use left-alignment for descriptions and metrics. Center alignment is acceptable for section headers only.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for testing.
No generic absolute transparent headers without backdrop blur. Ensure text contrast against images by using text shadow or gradient overlays.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic, centered layouts. Create depth with layered elements and z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters for floating elements.
Do not apply `transition: all` universally. Target specific properties.
Do not center align the App container.
Use modern pill-shaped or rounded-xl buttons with interaction animations.
Do not use emoji characters for icons; use Lucide icons.
Use generous spacing (2-3x more than standard).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
